# Borderless

> Borderless helps people move, study, work, or travel abroad without getting lost in bureaucracy. Pick a nationality, destination, and reason — get a personalized checklist, deadlines, and plain-language guides.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Build your move plan from nationality, destination, and reason.
- [Checklist](/checklist): Personalized documents, deadlines, Move Score, and readiness progress.
- [Compare](/compare): Side-by-side comparison of visa difficulty, work rights, and processing times.
- [Help](/help): Emergency contacts, lost-passport steps, and official portals.
